name: Atombit
blog_profile: Atombit is positioning as an 'Experience Intelligence' platform company, combining CX consulting with proprietary AI/data science capabilities acquired through Profusion and Amplify Analytix. Their methodology blends traditional journey mapping with GenAI-driven predictive analytics and behavioral data modeling. Delivery model is hybrid EU/India with emphasis on scalable analytics. Thought leadership centers on AI-augmented decision-making for enterprise CX transformation. PE-backed growth signals intent to compete at scale against larger consultancies.

name: Sovanta
blog_profile: Sovanta specializes in the intersection of SAP and Qualtrics, building embedded experience management solutions within SAP ecosystems. Their methodology focuses on making operational and experience data actionable through intuitive UX/UI design within enterprise workflows. AI approach is tied to SAP BTP and Qualtrics XM intelligence. Delivery model is DACH-first with EU expansion. Thought leadership emphasizes 'experience-driven enterprise' and the convergence of O-data and X-data.

name: New Metrics
blog_profile: New Metrics is a Qualtrics-specialized consultancy with deep roots in GCC government and semi-government CX transformation. Their methodology centers on national-level CX maturity frameworks, citizen experience measurement, and Voice of Customer programs for regulated industries. AI approach leverages Qualtrics XM Discover and text analytics for Arabic-language sentiment analysis. Delivery is consultancy-led with strong public sector credentials. Thought leadership focuses on CX as national competitiveness driver.

name: Ipsos CX
blog_profile: Ipsos CX combines large-scale market research expertise with technology-enabled CX measurement, primarily through Medallia partnerships. Their methodology is rooted in behavioral science, statistical rigor, and benchmarking across industries. AI approach focuses on predictive modeling for churn, loyalty drivers, and sentiment analysis at scale. Delivery model is global with dedicated CX practice teams. Thought leadership emphasizes the science of customer loyalty, emotional connections, and ROI of CX investments.

name: commonFont
blog_profile: commonFont is a dedicated Qualtrics implementation partner focused on the US market, offering managed services, program design, and technical deployment. Their methodology is deeply integrated with the Qualtrics platform, covering survey design, dashboard configuration, and program governance. AI approach is Qualtrics-native, leveraging XM Discover and iQ capabilities. Delivery model is consultative with ongoing managed services. Thought leadership focuses on practical Qualtrics optimization and XM program maturity.

name: Higher Oak
blog_profile: Higher Oak is a UK-based Qualtrics Platinum Partner specializing in experience management program design, implementation, and optimization. Their methodology emphasizes pragmatic, ROI-driven XM deployments with strong change management components. AI approach is Qualtrics-native with focus on text analytics and predictive insights. Delivery model is consultancy-led, serving UK and European enterprises. Thought leadership centers on making XM programs deliver measurable business outcomes.

name: Lukkap
blog_profile: Lukkap is a Spanish-origin CX and EX consultancy with a strong employee experience focus differentiating them in the Iberoamerican market. Their methodology combines customer journey mapping with employee journey design, emphasizing the CX-EX linkage. AI approach is less technology-platform-dependent, focusing more on consulting frameworks and behavioral insights. Delivery model is consultancy-led across Spain and Latin America. Thought leadership themes include Voice of Employee, hybrid work experience design, and purpose-driven transformation.

name: Izo
blog_profile: Izo is an Iberoamerican CX consultancy with Qualtrics certification and broad geographic coverage across Spanish and Portuguese-speaking markets. Their methodology blends CX strategy consulting with Qualtrics technology implementation, covering journey mapping, VoC programs, and CX governance. AI approach leverages Qualtrics platform capabilities with consulting overlay. Delivery model spans 15+ countries with deep expertise in banking, telco, and insurance verticals. Thought leadership focuses on CX maturity, digital experience transformation, and customer-centricity culture.

name: Globant
blog_profile: Globant's Connected Experiences Studio positions CX within a broader digital transformation and engineering services framework. Their methodology integrates design thinking, data engineering, and AI-driven personalization at enterprise scale. AI approach is engineering-first, building custom solutions rather than relying on specific XM platforms. Delivery model is global with massive engineering talent pools in Latin America. Thought leadership emphasizes connected, omnichannel experiences powered by AI and data but CX-specific content cadence is low relative to their overall output.

name: GemSeek
blog_profile: GemSeek fue absorbida por Accenture Song. Su propuesta original era analytics de CX con foco en predicción de churn y modelado de lealtad — un enfoque data science-first dentro del espacio CX. Sin actividad independiente desde la adquisición.

name: Vocé Group
blog_profile: Insufficient digital presence to develop a meaningful blog or content profile. No methodology, AI approach, or delivery model information available for assessment.

name: Zill Consulting
blog_profile: Insufficient digital presence to develop a meaningful blog or content profile. No methodology, AI approach, or delivery model information available for assessment.

name: Act XM
blog_profile: Insufficient digital presence to develop a meaningful blog or content profile. No methodology, AI approach, or delivery model information available for assessment.

name: Acceleration Strategy
blog_profile: Acceleration Strategy is a Canada/US-based Qualtrics partner focused on enterprise XM program implementation and optimization. Their methodology emphasizes strategic program design paired with Qualtrics technical deployment, with notable case studies in aviation (WestJet), cybersecurity (CrowdStrike), and gaming/public sector (OLG). AI approach is Qualtrics-native. Delivery model is North American consultancy-led. Limited independent thought leadership content, primarily visible through Qualtrics partner ecosystem.
